sourceSummary.oneLine: Samsung Electronics part approval sheet for material code MI63-03309A, described as SHEET-GF PB LOWER SHEET for 2G DETECTOR, supplied by K-WON Corporation.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports approval and inspection traceability for the GF PB LOWER SHEET part, including dimensional specifications, vendor identification, EC history, attached checklist items, and restricted-substance requirement.
keyPoints: Description is SHEET-GF PB LOWER SHEET.
EC History lists Rev. 00 dated 22.09.30 with comment 신규 승인.
Dimensional specifications list 348 ± 0.3 mm for 세로 and 428.5 ± 0.4 mm for 가로, both with result OK.
The part should not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.

reviewFlags.reason: Form Number is blank in the extracted text.
Top-level Revision field is blank, although EC History lists Rev. 00.
The extracted text contains both Form Version 03 and Form Version 00, suggesting multiple sheets or conflicting form-version metadata.
No external regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified; authority appears to be internal Samsung/vendor approval context.
Document title is inferred from source path and part description because no standalone title field is present in the sheet text.
